name: Potential Leakage of Data via High Outbound Emails
notes: This rule triggers when a high number of emails is sent to the same email address outside the organization. This could indicate a potential exfiltration of data.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: External Email Addresses
when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.Mail Send Success
when at least 100 events are seen with the same Sender (custom), Recipients (custom) in 1 hour(s)
thresholds: when at least 100 events are seen with the same Sender (custom), Recipients (custom) in 1 hour(s)
TD_list: APPLY Potential Leakage of Data via High Outbound Emails on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: External Email Addresses
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.Mail Send Success
AND when at least 100 events are seen with the same Sender (custom), Recipients (custom) in 1 hour(s)
RED_list: Event name: Potential Leakage of Data via High Outbound Emails
Event description: Detects when a high number of emails are sent to an email address outside the organization
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Sender (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
